name: delete_runs
full_help:
delete_runs

Description: 
Delete existing runs

Syntax: 
delete_runs  [-noclean_dir] [-quiet] [-verbose] <runs>

Usage: 
  Name            Description
  ---------------------------
  [-noclean_dir]  Do not remove all output files and directories from disk
  [-quiet]        Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]      Suspend message limits during command execution
  <runs>          Run to modify

Categories: 
Project

arguments.description: Do not remove all output files and directories from disk
Suspend message limits during command execution
